messages.content: Check the grammatical error: The schedule of operation meeting statistic report for statistic team
The grammatical error in the sentence is the use of "statistic" instead of "statistics". The correct sentence would be: "The schedule of operation meeting statistics report for the statistics team."
why?

The word "statistic" is an adjective used to describe something related to statistics, but it cannot be used as a noun by itself. "Statistics" is the correct noun form, which refers to the collection and analysis of numerical data. Therefore, the correct phrasing should be "statistics report", and "statistics team".

Dear Jan, 
 
I would like to apply for a sick leave on 18 May 2023 for HA doctor appointment.

This message contains a simple request for a sick leave, but there are a few grammatical errors. Here's a corrected version:

Dear Jan,

I would like to request a sick leave for May 18, 2023, as I have a doctor's appointment with a HA specialist.

Thank you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
please reply the above email

Dear [Your Name],

Thank you for informing me of your upcoming doctor's appointment. Your request for sick leave on May 18, 2023, is noted and approved. Please make sure that you submit the necessary documents, such as a medical certificate, upon your return to work.

I hope that you have a successful appointment and a speedy recovery. If you need any further assistance, please let me know.

Best regards,

Jan

Check the grammatical error: Dear all,

In order to make sure all team members could participate and practice more in preparing the OM statistic report, please refer to the table below for your scheduled months.
The arrangement will be effective from 1 June. @Suki, CHENG Sau Ki, the related email will be copied to you in June.

Team members	Month 
On Kwong (team leader)	5,11
Suki Cheng	6,12
Kin Szeto	1,7
Louis Cheng	2,8
Beccy Lam	3,9
Moni Li	4,10
There is no grammatical error in the given text. The sentence is grammatically correct.

Check the grammatical error: In order to make sure all team members could participate and practice more in preparing the OM statistic report, please refer to the schedule below for the new arrangement.
When you are preparing the report with the difficulties, you could ask for our support.

There is a grammatical error in the second sentence. Instead of "the difficulties", it should be "any difficulties". Here's the corrected version:

"In order to ensure that all team members can participate and practice more in preparing the OM statistic report, please refer to the schedule below for the new arrangement. If you encounter any difficulties while preparing the report, please feel free to ask for our support."
Check the grammatical error: Should you have any question on this matter, please feel free to contact me. Thank you.
There is no grammatical error in the given text. The sentence is grammatically correct.

Check the grammatical error: Please find the draft email below regarding the schedule for preparing the OM statistic report for your review. 
I will send to all team members upon your approval.
There is no grammatical error in the given text. The sentence is grammatically correct.

heck the grammatical error: As previously discussed, please advise your availability for the corporate records audit, which is estimated to take approximately 30 minutes.
The purpose of  this audit is to assess compliance with policy and guideline in relation to records management practices. For your information that the audit will focus on four key areas, including records storage, records condition, records documentation practices and records management practices.

There is one grammatical error in the given text. After "For your information that", it should be "note" instead of "that". Here's the corrected version:

"As previously discussed, please advise your availability for the corporate records audit, which is estimated to take approximately 30 minutes. The purpose of this audit is to assess compliance with policies and guidelines in relation to records management practices. Note that the audit will focus on four key areas, including records storage, records condition, records documentation practices, and records management practices."

Check the grammatical error: As previously discussed, please advise your availability for the corporate records audit, which is estimated to take approximately 30 minutes.
The purpose of  this audit is to assess compliance with policy and guideline in relation to records management practices. Note that the audit will focus on four key areas, including records storage, records condition, records documentation practices and records management practices.  

Your cooperation is appreciated and look forward to hearing back from you regarding your availability. Thank you very much.

There is one grammatical error in the given text. The conjunction "and" after "records documentation practices" should be replaced with a comma. Here's the corrected version:

"As previously discussed, please advise your availability for the corporate records audit, which is estimated to take approximately 30 minutes. The purpose of this audit is to assess compliance with policies and guidelines in relation to records management practices. Note that the audit will focus on four key areas, including records storage, records condition, records documentation practices, and records management practices. Your cooperation is appreciated, and I look forward to hearing back from you regarding your availability. Thank you very much."
Check the grammatical error:  As previously discussed with Petit , please advise your availability for the corporate records audit, which is estimated to take approximately 30 minutes.
There is no grammatical error in the given text. The sentence is grammatically correct.
